plainEnglish: This is the Level AAA version of 2.1.1: all functionality must be keyboard operable with no exceptions—even path-dependent actions like freehand drawing need a keyboard-operable alternative. Aim for full keyboard parity across the entire interface.
whyItMatters: Keyboard-only users are excluded from any feature—including path-based ones like drawing or signature capture—that has no keyboard-operable alternative.
quickCheck: Tab through the whole app and confirm every feature, including drag and draw interactions, has a keyboard-operable path with no mouse-only exceptions.
commonMistakes: Freehand drawing or signature tools with no keyboard alternative for entering the same data.
Drag-and-drop reordering that can't be performed with keyboard keys.
Relying on the 2.1.1 path-dependent exception, which does not apply at Level AAA.

codeExamples.label: Drag to reorder, with keyboard buttons as an equivalent
codeExamples.code: • Item A

codeExamples.label: Reordering only possible by mouse drag
